messages.no_messages_description_admin: Messages sent via the contact form will appear here.
messages.no_messages_description_user: Your conversations and the team's replies will appear here.
messages.subject: Subject

coupons.dialog_description: Generate a unique discount code for this user. It will be inserted into your reply.
coupons.product_placeholder: Search for a treatment or formation...
coupons.success_description: The code has been inserted into your message.
coupons.error_description: Could not create the promo code. Please try again.
coupons.response_text:
Dear soul,

As a token of gratitude for your patience, here is a personal promo code offering a {discount}% discount on your next purchase of "{productName}":

**{couponCode}**

Simply use it during checkout. We hope it brings a touch of light to your day.

With kindness,
